displayTitle: Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead #3
synopsis: Connor Freeman, Boba Fett's half-clone half-brother, has stepped into a firefight. Tasked with protecting Fett's former wife Sintas Vel and daughter Ailyn while their attacker's killer is hunted, Connor finds himself up against a Devaronian hit squad. Meanwhile, as Darth Vader searches for the intruder who explosively infiltrated the Imperial base on Blackfel, that intruder sets an elite stormtrooper platoon up for a devastating fall.
title: Blood Ties: Boba Fett is Dead #3
